zh.lifeSummary: 當Turlogh O'Brien Bishop Killloe於大約1353年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭時，他的父親Murtagh Caech O'Brien23歲，母親Ellen Fitzgerald18歲。他於1382年與Lady Maria O'Brien在愛爾蘭萊音斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1428年在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 阿馬格克萊爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Turlogh O'Brien Bishop Killloe于大约1353年出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭时，他的父亲Murtagh Caech O'Brien23岁，母亲Ellen Fitzgerald18岁。他于1382年与Lady Maria O'Brien在爱尔兰萊音斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1428年在英国北爱尔兰庫迪 阿馬格克萊爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.

nameMeanings.name: Turlogh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Toirdhealbhach
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from a byname meaning ‘instigator’, from toirdhealbh ‘prompting’. It was the name of a High King of Ireland who died in 1156 .

en.lifeSummary: When Turlogh O'Brien Bishop Killloe was born about 1353, in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Murtagh Caech O'Brien, was 23 and his mother, Ellen Fitzgerald, was 18. He married Lady Maria O'Brien in 1382, in Leinster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1428, in Clare, County Armagh, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

Il a épousé Lady Maria O'Brien en 1382, à Leinster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1428, à Clare, County Armagh, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Turlogh O'Brien Bishop Killloe(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Murtagh Caech O'Brien(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Fitzgerald(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1382년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 Lady Maria O'Brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 아마그h 클래르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Turlogh O'Brien Bishop Killloe родился около 1353 г. в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Murtagh Caech O'Brien было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Fitzgerald, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Maria O'Brien в 1382 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1428 г. в местности клар, коунти армаг, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.
